form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.44) at Richmond in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 7 lengths. Has two successes and three minors from seven starts from box 1. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 5.5 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Looks a strong place chance on best figures.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at Richmond Straight last time when a 2.25 lengths third but did record a slick 17.58 over the 324m trip. Bold showing expected but prefer each way again.

form.formComment: Country racer who only starts fairly, coming off mixed results. Was 3rd last start over 440m at Goulburn (25.31) beaten 6 lengths, behind Cawbourne Zara in Grade 5 on April 10. Looks tested in this company.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 2nd on April 10 over 440m at Goulburn behind Cawbourne Zara beaten half a length (24.94) in a Grade 5. Deserves a win and gets his chance.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 7 over 340m at this track behind Paw Zeva beaten 6 lengths (19.63) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Back from a three-and-a-half months spell and last resumed over 515m at Gosford where she was in the placings, finishing third. Hard to have this time.
